Bash(cd "C:\\Users\\prana\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\GitHub\\Fabled" && python -c "
import ast

with open\('main.py'\) as f:
    src = f.read\(\)
tree = ast.parse\(src\)

game_cls = next\(n for n in ast.walk\(tree\) if isinstance\(n, ast.ClassDef\) and n.name == 'Game'\)
methods = [n.name for n in ast.walk\(game_cls\) if isinstance\(n, ast.FunctionDef\)]

checks = [
    '_is_lan', '_lan_my_player', '_lan_send', '_lan_send_state', '_lan_tick',
    '_handle_lan_message', '_handle_lan_host_msg', '_handle_lan_client_msg',
    '_start_lan_battle', '_serialize_picks', '_deserialize_picks',
    '_serialize_unit', '_apply_unit_state', '_serialize_action', '_deserialize_action',
    '_finish_team_select', '_enter_action_selection', '_finish_selection',
    '_begin_step_resolution', '_auto_continue_resolve_done', '_maybe_auto_progress',
    '_enter_round_start', '_handle_extra_swap_click',
]
for c in checks:
    print\(f'{c}: {c in methods}'\)
")
